caption: Hey everyone, welcome to my secret corner of the campus. ☀️✨ I'm Chloe, and today I'm feeling bold. The golden spring light is hugging my curves just right, the silk of my blouse feeling cool against my skin as I tuck my skirt into my heels. Everyone knows I'm the strict professor, but they don't know the thrill I get from the quiet glances I get in the lecture hall. It's a tightrope walk between the desk and the desire, and I love balancing it. Who else is ready for the semester to end? #UniversityTeacherLife #SpringVibes #SecretDesire
